one_time_description: Loss on investment in South Beach Group of Partnerships (modified equity method)
economic_notes: First Nation operates a pharmacy, grocery store, fuel sales, entertainment centre, and holds a one-seventh interest in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership. FNFA loan of $4.888M obtained during year for long-term financing.
notes: Prior year figures restated due to correction of error in accounting for South Beach Management Services Ltd., South Beach Capital Partners Limited Partnership, and SBCP Inc. investments. Consolidated entity includes 12 subsidiaries and 1 GBE (South Beach Group of Partnerships) under modified equity method. COVID-19 reported as a separate segment with $3,038,218 in expenses. Economic Development segment expenses of $2,682,525 included in infrastructure field as best available mapping. Accumulated surplus beginning of 2020 also restated. Annual debt service is principal repayments per cash flow statement.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
